previous_campaign_summary: Multi-theme (6 themes), i18n (zh/en), real PDF export, conversation sharing, backup/restore, custom tab labels, browser notifications, mobile bottom nav, video task history, smart prompt suggestions, conversation import, in-browser image editor, image comparison, updated onboarding tour. 18 phases completed, all CI passed.

objective_registry.user_value: Cmd+K with fuzzy search, navigation, actions
Pure-JS PDF with title, dates, content

phases.scope: useCollections hook + CollectionPicker + CollectionsManager + filter in AssetWorkspace
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can group hundreds of assets into named collections, with dedicated filter and management UI
phases.before_after: Assets only filterable by kind/tag, no grouping concept
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created useCollections hook + CollectionPicker + CollectionsManager. Assets can be added to multiple collections. Filter row in toolbar shows collections. Bundle 643KB (essentially same).

phases.scope: expandVariables() supports {date}, {time}, {datetime}, {year}, {month}, {day}; integrated into image and chat templates
phases.user_visible_gain: Templates can include {{date}}, {{time}} etc. that auto-expand when used
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added 6 variables (date, time, datetime, year, month, day) with expandVariables() function. Updated 2 seed templates to use {{date}} and {{datetime}}. Bundle 644KB (+1KB).

phases.objective: Global search across all data (conversations, assets, tags)
phases.scope: GlobalSearchModal with grouped results (conversations, messages, assets, tags, collections), keyboard navigation
phases.user_visible_gain: Find anything in the app from a single search bar (Cmd+Shift+F)
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created GlobalSearchModal with 5 result groups, fuzzy substring match, keyboard navigation (Up/Down/Enter/Esc). Bundle 651KB (+6KB).

phases.scope: useUsageStats hook tracks 5 event types; StatsPanel shows total counts
phases.user_visible_gain: Users see their AI usage stats (messages, images, videos) in the chat sidebar
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created useUsageStats hook with 5 event types and event log. Wired to ChatWorkspace (message_sent) and ImageWorkspace (image_generated). StatsPanel shows aggregate counts. Bundle 652KB (+1KB).

phases.objective: Code review and dead code cleanup
phases.user_visible_gain: Verified project is healthy: 49 tests, clean lint, no TODOs
phases.before_after: 4 campaigns of features, need quality gate
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, no unused, bundle 652KB
phases.notes: All checks pass. 49 tests, clean code, bundle 652KB (+9KB for 4 phases of Campaign 005). Project is healthy.

phases.scope: useSpeechToText hook with Web Speech API; VoiceInputButton with mic toggle; visual feedback
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can dictate messages via microphone instead of typing
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created useSpeechToText hook using Web Speech API. VoiceInputButton toggles recording. Final transcripts append to composer. Bundle 654KB (+2KB).

phases.scope: ActivityHeatmap component showing 12 weeks of usage events as GitHub-style heatmap
phases.user_visible_gain: Users see activity patterns over time in the stats panel
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created ActivityHeatmap with 12 weeks of data, GitHub-style grid, 5 intensity levels, total count and active days stats. Bundle 657KB (+3KB).

phases.objective: Auto theme based on time of day
phases.scope: useTheme with autoMode flag; checks hour every minute; light 6am-6pm, dark otherwise
phases.user_visible_gain: Theme automatically follows the time of day when enabled
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added autoMode to useTheme. Checks hour every 60s, applies light/dark based on 6am-6pm threshold. Bundle 658KB (+1KB).

phases.scope: Added play/pause button + S key shortcut to lightbox. Auto-advance every 3.5s. Fade-in animation on image change. Visual active state.
phases.user_visible_gain: Showcase assets in a beautiful slideshow
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added Slideshow button to lightbox toolbar. Auto-advance via setInterval. S key toggles. Bundle 658KB (no change).

phases.scope: exportSettingsProfile() / importSettingsProfile() in SettingsModal. JSON with type=version+theme+language+prefs+labels+autoTheme.
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can backup and sync settings across devices
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added SettingsProfileButtons to SettingsModal. Excludes data (conversations/assets/tags) — only configuration. Bundle 661KB (+3KB).

phases.objective: Performance audit and bundle size optimization
phases.scope: Lazy-load StatsPanel, PdfExportButton, ExportModal in ChatWorkspace. Main bundle 661KB → 651KB (-10KB, -3KB gzipped).
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Code-split PdfExportButton, StatsPanel, ExportModal as separate chunks. Load on demand rather than initial bundle.

phases.scope: usePromptHistory + usePromptSuggestions with token-based + frequency scoring. Records every sent prompt, suggests top 3 matches as chips above composer.
phases.user_visible_gain: Faster prompt entry with personalized suggestions
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Bundle 653KB (+2KB). Suggestions appear when typing, click to fill input. Stores up to 100 unique prompts.

phases.scope: useAssetTags.suggestTags(source, limit) — tokenizes source (filename) and scores against existing tag frequency. TagPicker shows 智能推荐 section with sparkles icon.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Bundle 654KB (+1KB). Smart suggestions appear with sparkles icon. Score = matches*10 + frequency.

phases.scope: Added bulk delete, bulk pin/unpin to sidebar multi-select UI. Updated usePinnedConversations with allPinned, bulkPin, bulkUnpin.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Bulk actions bar now shows: select all, archive, pin/unpin, delete. Uses existing archiving hooks and new pinned hooks.

phases.scope: Added content-visibility: auto with contain-intrinsic-size to asset cards for native browser virtualization
phases.before_after: Full DOM render for all assets
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Native browser virtualization via content-visibility: auto. Off-screen cards skip rendering until near viewport.

phases.scope: useDraftPersistence hook saves draft per conversation to localStorage with 500ms debounce. ChatWorkspace keyed by conversation ID.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Draft saved per conversation ID. Keyed by conversation.id to remount on switch.

phases.scope: Run full checks: TypeScript, ESLint, tests, build. Fix any remaining issues.
phases.before_after: Ensure all Phase 13-16 work is solid
